issues.title: Enemy dealt 78 dmg (58% of 135 HP) on floor 12 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 12, encounter 2, turn 6 (seq 584), the enemy dealt 78 damage which is 58% of the player's 135 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: 28 consecutive encounters with >90% HP remaining (floors 1-10)
issues.description: 28 consecutive encounters (indices 0 to 27) ended with player HP above 90% of max (100). HP remaining: 98, 100, 100, 100, 98, 99, 98, 100, 100, 98, 100, 100, 100, 100, 97, 98, 94, 100, 98, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 93, 100, 100. This suggests these encounters are too easy.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider increasing enemy HP or damage for these encounters.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 7 turns vs prev floor avg 3.0 (2.3x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 (enemy: the_archivist, boss) took 7 turns to resolve, which is 2.3x the previous floor's average of 3.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: HP dropped from 100 to 0 in floor 24 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 24, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 0. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage caps per encounter or provide emergency healing at low HP.

issues.title: Card type 'aoe' never played across entire run
issues.description: The card type 'aoe' was never used in any play_card action during the entire 72-encounter run. Card types used: buff, attack, debuff, shield, utility, heal, regen. This may indicate the type is never dealt or is unappealing to play.
issues.suggestedFix: Ensure 'aoe' cards appear in starting deck or are offered as rewards.
